notes: First-pass fit model for layout, service access, and 3D-print enclosure iteration.
Verify every component with calipers before printing a functional enclosure.
Dimensions include practical clearance where noted; not all vendor pages publish exact dimensions.

solar_panel_placeholder.notes: Exact solar panel not selected yet; top pocket is intentionally replaceable.

injora_35kg_servo.notes: Mount tabs and wire strain relief need physical verification.

xiao_nrf52840_sense_pinned.source: Seeed XIAO footprint plus pin/header clearance
xiao_nrf52840_sense_pinned.notes: Board footprint is 21 x 17.5mm; depth includes pre-soldered header/USB clearance.

wago_222_413_pair.source: WAGO 222-413 datasheet dimensions, rounded for clearance

lm2596_buck_current.notes: This is the bulky current prototype buck. Future low-Iq regulator can shrink this bay.

battery_2s_5000mah.notes: Designed as a vertical bottom-inserting cartridge with only a small pull lip exposed.

future_camera_placeholders.notes: Not modeled as functional cutouts yet; reserve optional top/front service space.
